text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the Yasuda Kinen, the race that
determines the spring King of the Mile...

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
The rain is really coming down today! The track is
completely soaked.

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
I think this might be too much for Taiki Shuttle to
handle.

There's a lot of concern brewing around whether
Taiki Shuttle can perform well in these conditions.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Oh, the weather's not looking so hot today. Gray
skies and not a lick o' sunshine.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
But I ain't bothered one bit! I'm ready for
anything, come hell or high water!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
My heart's burnin' so hot, that rain'll turn straight
into steam around me!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I tell ya what! I'm gonna show the crowd some real
good runnin' to get 'em all fired up!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
It'll take more than a few raindrops to dampen my
power and speed!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: I will! Make sure ya root me on!
